4:["id","3","d"]
0:["8DvQpT4JGfykSjjBvizjy",[[["",{"children":["articles",{"children":[["id","3","d"],{"children":["__PAGE__?{\"id\":\"3\"}",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",true],["",{"children":["articles",{"children":[["id","3","d"],{"children":["__PAGE__",{},[["$L1",["$","$L2",null,{"article":{"id":"3","title":"如何给AI开放权限（从 messaging 到 full）","summary":"刚部署完 OpenClaw，发现AI像个\"残疾助手\"，怎么办？","source":"经验分享","date":"2026-03-04","readTime":"5min","tags":["权限","配置","踩坑"],"rating":5,"content":"## 问题背景\n\n刚部署完 OpenClaw，发现AI像个\"残疾助手\"：\n- ❌ 不能写文件\n- ❌ 不能执行命令\n- ❌ 不能控制浏览器\n- ❌ 不能spawn子Agent\n\n检查后发现：`openclaw.json` 里 `\"tools.profile\": \"messaging\"`\n\n## 解决方案\n\n### 1. 找到配置文件\n\n```\n~/.openclaw/openclaw.json\n```\n\n### 2. 修改权限配置\n\n**原来的（受限）：**\n```json\n\"tools\": {\n  \"profile\": \"messaging\"\n}\n```\n\n**改成（完整）：**\n```json\n\"tools\": {\n  \"profile\": \"full\"\n}\n```\n\n### 3. 重启 Gateway\n\n```bash\nopenclaw gateway restart\n```\n\n### 4. 验证权限\n\n测试以下功能：\n- `write()` 写文件 ✅\n- `exec()` 执行命令 ✅\n- `browser()` 控制浏览器 ✅\n- `sessions_spawn()` 创建子Agent ✅\n\n## 权限等级对比\n\n| 等级 | 文件 | 执行 | 浏览器 | 子Agent |\n|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|\n| `none` | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| `messaging` | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| `standard` | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |\n| `full` | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |\n\n## 安全建议\n\n- **开发环境**：直接用 `full`\n- **生产环境**：按需授权，用 `allow` 白名单\n- **敏感操作**：二次确认，避免误操作\n\n```json\n\"tools\": {\n  \"profile\": \"standard\",\n  \"allow\": [\"file\", \"exec\", \"web_search\"]\n}\n```\n\n## 我的教训\n\n刚开始不知道有这个限制，和AI折腾了半天文件读写，结果发现是配置问题 🤦‍♂️\n\n**建议：部署后第一件事就是检查权限配置！**"}}],null],null],null]},[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","segmentPath":["children","articles","children","$4","children"],"error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L5",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","notFoundStyles":"$undefined"}]],null]},[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","segmentPath":["children","articles","children"],"error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L5",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","notFoundStyles":"$undefined"}]],null]},[[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/css/52a52579fa00d1ac.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"zh-CN","children":["$","body",null,{"className":"antialiased min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-cream","children":[["$","$L6",null,{}],["$","main",null,{"className":"flex-1","children":["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","segmentPath":["children"],"error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L5",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":[["$","title",null,{"children":"404: rgba(255,255,255,.3)}}"}}],["$","h1",null,{"className":"next-error-h1","style":{"display":"inline-block","margin":"0 20px 0 0","padding":"0 23px 0 page could not be found."}]}]]}]}]],"notFoundStyles":[]}]}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"bg-cream-light mt-16 py-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-col items-center gap-4","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-2xl","children":"🐯"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"text-text-secondary","children":"镇山虎养成日记"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex
